compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK, TT Fans AC, Prima Klima AC
compatible_devices.notes: Dual AC fan sockets (left = intake, right = exhaust); available in 4.5A and 7A models; electronic phase/PWM speed control; NTC sensor included (5m); manages negative pressure between intake and exhaust; NOT compatible with EC fans; no relay outputs for humidifiers, CO2, or heaters
